title: Lee Rowley - Minister of State (Minister for Housing) at the Department for Levelling Up, Housing and Communities - advice under the Business Appointment Rules
body: "Researcher/Policy Fellow, Centre for Policy Studies  Mr Rowley received advice from the Independent Adviser on Ministerial Standards on an paid appointment with the Centre for Policy Studies. The advice was provided in October 2025 and the appointment was taken up in November 2025.  Chief Strategy Officer/Director of Public Sector & Government Practice, S&A Transform Group  Mr Rowley received advice from the Independent Adviser on Ministerial Standards on an paid appointment with the S&A Transform Group. The advice was provided in October 2025 and the appointment was taken up in November 2025.  ACOBA published on its website advice provided to Mr Rowley before its closure. "
